name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm
strategy: Replace three separate ATen matmul and addition with three direct cuBLAS SGEMM calls: SGEMM1 W@X (opA=N,opB=N), SGEMM2 X@B (opA=N,opB=T) producing U shape [d,16] with ldc=d, SGEMM3 A@U (opA=N,opB=N) with beta=1 accumulating into Y. Eliminates explicit transpose of B and separate addition kernel.
